title: Stuffed!
description: a mod that adds 'plushies' (models) that you can place in your world
body:
# Stuffed!
## Overview
This mod adds a few plushies to the game. 
## Plushies
Below is a list of plushies that are (or are going to be) in the mod.
### Current
- Arctic Fox (one state)
- Seal
- Wolf
- firewallVT (finished is a loose term)
- Sheep (same as above)

## Other Features
### Implemented
- plushes in certain places depending on what it is
- plushes face the player when placed
- creative mode tabs
- crafting recipies
### Roadmap
- ability to place them on your head in the inventory (currently possible through /item)
